location.hometown_context: originally from Ajaigarh in district Panna

home.intro_title: Hello, my name is Mohd Ansar Bux
home.brief_intro: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building and deploying scalable web applications using Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, React, Next.js, MySQL, and AWS.

about.bio: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building and deploying scalable web applications using Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, React, Next.js, MySQL, and AWS CLI. Experienced in designing secure REST APIs, implementing authentication and authorization systems, optimizing application performance, and managing cloud infrastructure. Delivered production-grade platforms from architecture and development to deployment and maintenance in agile environments.

what_i_do.title: Backend Engineering
what_i_do.description: Designing secure REST APIs, microservices architectures, and JWT integrations.

what_i_do.title: Full-Stack Apps
what_i_do.description: Building interactive single page and server-rendered apps with React, Next.js, and Angular.

what_i_do.title: Cloud Infrastructure
what_i_do.description: Managing resources on AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, CloudFront, Route 53) and CI/CD pipelines.

what_i_do.title: Team Leadership
what_i_do.description: Experienced in leading cross-functional developer groups and system architectures.

competencies.title: Teamwork & Scrum
competencies.description: Successfully led teams and collaborated in agile environments.

competencies.title: Problem Solving
competencies.description: Creative and efficient in resolving complex system issues.

competencies.title: Effective Communication
competencies.description: Able to convey ideas clearly and concisely, both technically and non-technically.

competencies.title: Fast Learner
competencies.description: Quickly adapting to new software frameworks and database architectures.

responsibilities: Architected and delivered the complete company web platform using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, and MySQL.
Built scalable backend and CMS handling more than 15 page modules.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by approximately 40%.
Developed 70+ REST APIs secured with JWT, HttpOnly cookies, and RBAC.
Provisioned and managed AWS infrastructure including EC2, RDS, S3, CloudFront, SES, Route 53, and CloudWatch.
Led a cross-functional team of 8+ engineers.
Built Spring Boot backend with JWT authentication and RBAC.
Collaborated with Next.js frontend team on API integration.
Worked on system architecture and R&D.
Completed Java Full Stack Development program.
Built an Angular portfolio application as capstone project.
Completed Java Full Stack internship covering Java, OOP, backend development, and web fundamentals.
